headline: Language Policy Shift Mandates More Bahasa in STEM Subjects
context: MOE announced that from 2027, at least 60% of STEM instruction in national schools must be conducted in Bahasa Malaysia.

cards.big: 60% Bahasa Malaysia instruction mandate for STEM starting 2027 reverses PPSMI trend
cards.sub: English-medium science teaching introduced in 2003 then reversed in 2012

cards.big: Malaysia's PISA 2025 science score dropped 12 points from 2022 assessment
cards.sub: Language of instruction debates have created policy instability for 23 years

cards.big: 78% of STEM research journals indexed in Scopus are published in English
cards.sub: Students need English proficiency to access current scientific literature

cards.big: Article 152 establishes Bahasa Malaysia as the national language of instruction
cards.sub: Constitutional mandate creates tension with global academic English demands

cards.big: The real failure is not choosing a language—it is not mastering both
Should Malaysia adopt genuine bilingual STEM education rather than alternating policies
